name: aivis
description: AIVIS — AI Vision Inspection System monorepo (frontend workspaces). See CLAUDE.md.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @aivis/hmi && npm run build --workspace @aivis/dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @aivis/hmi && npm run lint --workspace @aivis/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @aivis/hmi && npm run test --workspace @aivis/dashboard
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
